subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: There are two states of existence—the temporal and the eternal- the conditioned and the unconditioned—the estate of impotence and of primeval power.
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @Muhammad; Islam, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Christ; Christianity, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal
